nasb.text: For the Scripture says, “You shall not muzzle the ox while he is threshing,” and “The laborer is worthy of his wages.”

esv.text: For the Scripture says, “You shall not muzzle an ox when it treads out the grain,” and, “The laborer deserves his wages.”

cnv.text: 因為經上說：“牛踹穀的時候，不可籠住牠的嘴。”又說：“作工的配得工價。”

ccb.text: 因为圣经上说：“牛在踩谷时，不可笼住它的嘴。”又说：“做工的得报酬是应该的。”

csbs.text: 原来经上说： “牛踹谷的时候，不可笼住它的嘴。” 又说：“工人配得自己的酬报。”
